heading:
Ways to
Train With Me

offerings.title: Private Coaching
offerings.description: Tailored one-on-one or small-group instruction. Scheduling and rates vary depending on your location and travel requirements.

offerings.title: Regular Group Classes
offerings.description: Join the Lapunti Karilyon community for our regular Sunday sessions at UP Diliman. Features a beginner-friendly, progressive curriculum.

offerings.title: Seminars & Workshops
offerings.description: Intensive group training for clubs, martial arts schools, or organizations (minimum 10 participants). Custom rates plus travel and lodging apply. Please provide adequate lead time for scheduling and curriculum preparation.

offerings.title: Distance Mentorship / Affiliate Track
offerings.description: Designed for dedicated practitioners outside our regular training area. This track combines remote coaching with flexible, custom-negotiated travel arrangements for intensive in-person training, offering a pathway to establish an official local study group or branch under the Lapunti Karilyon umbrella.

note: To maintain a safe, respectful, and high-quality training environment, all prospective students undergo an initial intake assessment. I reserve the right to select students and manage enrollment to ensure the best fit for our community.
